title: Nexus SoulNarrativeResponse
description: Response body for POST /v1/local/memory/soul/reflect. Reports the whole-Creator SOUL narrative cache state, stale metadata, current counts, and insufficient-data thresholds.

state.description: Narrative cache state. `insufficient_data` means the endpoint did not invoke synthesis because one or more minimum thresholds is not met.

narrative.description: Cached reflective narrative. Present only for `current` or `stale` rows; omitted for `ungenerated` and `insufficient_data`.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 generation timestamp. Present only when a cached narrative exists.

stale.description: True only when a cached narrative exists and current fragment stats differ from the generation snapshot.

fragment_count_at_generation.description: Fragment-count snapshot persisted with the cached narrative. Present only when a cached narrative exists.

max_fragment_created_at_at_generation.description: RFC 3339 timestamp snapshot of the newest fragment included in generation. Present only when a cached narrative exists and at least one fragment existed at generation time.

current_fragment_count.description: Current whole-Creator fragment count used for stale and insufficient-data decisions.

current_distinct_keyword_count.description: Current distinct keyword count across all Creator fragments.

min_fragment_count.description: Minimum fragment count required before synthesis is allowed. Exposed so clients can render threshold copy and tests.

min_distinct_keyword_count.description: Minimum distinct keyword count required before synthesis is allowed. Exposed so clients can render threshold copy and tests.
